tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name  'hping3' -o -name 'tar' -o -name 'curl' -o -name 'wget' \) -exec chmod 750 {} +;; if [ -d /usr/src/app/staged ]; then chmod 750 /usr/src/app/staged; fi; if [ -f  /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz ]; then chmod 640 /usr/src/app/staged.tar.gz; fi; ls  -ld /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null; ls -l /usr/src/app 2>/dev/nulll
